title: Medieval Steps - Dinan
author: noxfcna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
110 Shots - Panasonic GF7

Dinan - France

Processed with Agisoft Photoscan

Cute littles steps climbing to an old medieval door. This scene takes place under lots of trees near the Dinan's rempart. Lots of old walls and stones all around, really nice place. 

This city is quite amazing and a lot of possibilty for scanning.

I hope you will like it.

fell free to post any comments // Still wondering what display is most liked between lit and shadeless // cute vs reality.

Source: Objaverse 1.0 / Sketchfab
